summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Email Notification feature using Resend API. 21/21 tests passed (100%). All email triggers working: welcome on signup, application submitted on profile creation, approval/rejection emails on admin actions, and test email endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: EmailService class properly initializes with RESEND_API_KEY from environment
Good: All email methods use asyncio.to_thread for non-blocking execution
Good: Background tasks used for all email triggers (send_welcome_email, send_application_submitted_email, etc.)
Good: Email templates include professional HTML styling with NotaryChain branding
Good: Error handling returns {success: false, error: message} for failed emails
Good: Admin-only /api/email/test endpoint for testing all 6 email templates
Good: /api/email/status endpoint provides configuration status for debugging
Good: Proper authorization checks - non-admin users get 403 on test endpoint
Note: Resend is in test mode - only verified email address (cmv92570@gmail.com) can receive actual emails
Note: Rate limiting observed (2 req/sec) - expected behavior from Resend
seed_data_creation: Created test users during tests (notaryapplicant_*@test.com) with notary profiles for testing email triggers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Email service fully integrated with Resend API. 2) All 6 email templates working: welcome, notarization_complete, application_submitted, application_approved, application_rejected, request_assigned. 3) Emails triggered via BackgroundTasks (non-blocking). 4) Resend test mode limits delivery to verified address only. 5) Rate limit: 2 req/sec in test mode. 6) Production requires domain verification at resend.com/domains.

application_submitted_email.notes: Application submitted email queued when notary profile created

application_approved_email.notes: Approval email queued when admin approves notary application

application_rejected_email.notes: Rejection email with reason queued when admin rejects application

test_email_endpoint.notes: Admin-only endpoint to test all 6 email templates

email_templates_verified: notarization_complete - Notarization completion with blockchain info
application_approved - Notary approval with commission number
request_assigned - Notary assigned to user's request

resend_integration.test_mode_behavior: Only verified email (cmv92570@gmail.com) receives actual emails
